_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
clinical_indications: Subarachnoid hemorrhage resulting in acute hydrocephalus
Shunt failure due to mechanical disruption or infection
Brain relaxation in the OT, etc.

ppd_preauth.q: Clinical notes including history, symptoms, signs, vitals, examination findings, planned line of treatment and advice for admission?
Did the patient present with vomiting, altered sensorium, drowsiness, seizure, generalized tonic-clonic convulsions, headache?
Was clinical presentation and imaging indicative of surgery?
Was the patient on/presented with/evidence of: On anticoagulation therapy?
Was the patient on/presented with/evidence of: Scalp infection?
Was the patient on/presented with/evidence of: Brain Abscess?

cpd_claim.q: Are the detailed ICPs with daily vitals and line of treatment?
Are the detailed procedure / Operative Notes available?
Is the Discharge summary with follow-up advise at the time of discharge?
Was CT brain pre and post-surgery report submitted?

common_queries: Clinical notes are missing or incomplete, or do not include history, symptoms, signs, vitals, examination findings, planned line of treatment, or advice for admission.
Patient did not present with vomiting, altered sensorium, drowsiness, seizure, generalized tonic-clonic convulsions, or headache without proper justification.
Clinical presentation or imaging not indicative of surgery.
Patient is on anticoagulation therapy without documented justification.
Scalp infection is present without documented justification.
Brain abscess is present without documented justification.
Detailed Indoor case papers with daily vitals and line of treatment are missing or incomplete.
Detailed procedure / Operative Notes are not available.
Discharge summary with follow-up advise at the time of discharge is missing or incomplete.
Pre- and post-surgery CT brain reports are missing.

additional_information.clinical_key_pointers_uncertain: The 'Clinical key pointers' section in the Medco document is explicitly titled and refers to 'External Ventricular Drains (EVDs)' only. No specific key pointers for 'Ventricular Puncture' were found.
additional_information.post_op_care_uncertain: The 'Complications of EVD' and 'Removal of the EVD' sections in the Medco document are specific to EVD. No separate post-operative care instructions were found for 'Ventricular Puncture'.
additional_information.contraindications_uncertain: The 'Contraindications' section in the Medco document is listed generally and not explicitly differentiated between EVD and Ventricular Puncture. These contraindications are considered applicable to both procedures given the context.
